title: leucosceptrum stellipilum var. tosaense
intro: Leucosceptrum stellipilum var. tosaense, also known as the Tohoku or Tosa Leucosceptrum, is a plant species belonging to the Lamiaceae family. Traditionally, this plant is used in herbal medicine, particularly in East Asian cultures, for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant actions. The health benefits of Leucosceptrum stellipilum var. tosaense include its ability to alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to reduce fever and relieve pain. Leucosceptrum stellipilum var. tosaense can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, which are then consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
